title: Section 54
content: 1[54. Rural Credit and Development.--The Bank may maintain expert staff to study various aspects of rural credit and development and in particular it may:-- (a) tender expert guidance and assistance to the National Bank; (b) conduct special studies in such areas as it may consider necessary to do so for promoting integrated rural development.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 61 of 1981, s. 61 and the Second Schedule, for section 54 (w.e.f. 12-7-1982).
